48:
New to Idyllshire? Never fear! For a mere thousand gil, I will <Emphasis>personally</Emphasis> give you a guided─
...I say, you look like an adventurer who knows <If(PlayerParameter(4))>her<Else/>his</If> business. Might you perchance be familiar with the divine lanners?

67:
High above the heavens, a king in his domain,♪
Soaring o'er creation, the lonely monarch reigns.♪
Borne upon the wind, a whistle's piercing sound,♪
Calls him to descend to find a soul by destiny bound.♪
